prompt: J'ai deux captures à traiter : a_trier/agents/architecture-agentique.png et a_trier/agents/exemple-prompt-B.png, extrais le texte de chacune dans un fichier.
assertions: Two separate output files are created, one per source image, each named after its corresponding image
Each output file contains only the text from its own source image, with no cross-contamination between the two images' content
Neither output file contains a 'Summary' section (none was requested)
Both files are non-empty and reflect distinct content matching their respective source images
